mapper.sql: SELECT TCC.GROUP_CODE AS GROUP_CODE , TCG.GROUP_CODE_NAME AS GROUP_CODE_NAME , TCC.COMMON_CODE AS COMMON_CODE , TCC.COMMON_CODE_NAME AS COMMON_CODE_NAME , TCC.COMMON_CODE_ORDER AS COMMON_CODE_ORDER , TCC.EMPTY_VAL_1 AS EMPTY_VAL_1 , TCC.EMPTY_VAL_2 AS EMPTY_VAL_2 , TCC.EMPTY_VAL_3 AS EMPTY_VAL_3 , TCC.EMPTY_VAL_4 AS EMPTY_VAL_4 , TCC.EMPTY_VAL_5 AS EMPTY_VAL_5 , TCC.CREATE_USER_ID AS CREATE_USER_ID , TCC.UPDATE_USER_ID AS UPDATE_USER_ID , TCC.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE , TCC.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DATE , TCC.USE_YN AS USE_YN , TCC.COMMON_CODE_ID AS COMMON_CODE_ID

where.if: AND TCC.UPDATE_DATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{vo.startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{vo.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')

mapper.sql: FROM TB_COMMON_CODE TCC INNER JOIN TB_COMMON_GROUP TCG ON TCC.GROUP_CODE = TCG.GROUP_CODE
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_COMMON_CODE
COMMON_CODE = #{vo.commonCode},
COMMON_CODE_NAME = #{vo.commonCodeName},
COMMON_CODE_ORDER = #{vo.commonCodeOrder},
USE_YN = #{vo.useYn},
UPDATE_USER_ID = #{vo.updateUserId}, UPDATE_DATE = NOW()
WHERE COMMON_CODE_ID = #{vo.commonCodeId}
